blockers.title: Vault-required data-request path is absent
blockers.evidence: The vault PRD requires the privacy page plus a public request-your-data/delete-your-data route that creates a DataRequest (`/Users/ismac/Documents/Projects/WAI/02 Platform/02 PRD Phase 2 - Public Site & Join Flow.md:121-128`). Stage 0 defines `DataRequest` and `submitDataRequest`/approval actions (`.../02 Stage 0 - Technical Design (Public Site & Portal).md:156-158,244-245,280-283,298`). The repo has no `submitDataRequest`, no `dataRequests` table, and no route/UI for this; `src/pages/privacy.astro:122-130` only tells users to email support.
blockers.required_fix: Implement the public data-request route plus Convex `dataRequests` table/action/audit trail and tests, or record an explicit vault/spec decision deferring this P0 requirement before launch.

blockers.title: Committed Gate 4 review artifact is stale
blockers.evidence: `.codex/audits/trust-pages.review.json:1` still records DO-NOT-SHIP because it claims `src/pages/terms.astro:42-45` adds a non-vault lede. Current `src/pages/terms.astro:42-43` is only a comment saying there is no lede, and the rendered body starts at `Who these terms are between` (`src/pages/terms.astro:50-58`), matching the vault terms draft (`.../02 Membership Terms & Website Conditions (Draft).md:27-32`).
blockers.required_fix: Archive the old failed review under a round-specific filename or remove it, then rerun Gate 4 so `.codex/audits/trust-pages.review.json` reflects the current review.

blockers.title: Spec/source-map metadata contradicts the resolved privacy decision
blockers.evidence: `specs/trust-pages.spec.md:15-17` says the privacy draft was amended and `POLICY_VERSION` bumped to 2026-07-02, which the code implements (`convex/members.ts:27-31`, `src/pages/privacy.astro:156-158`). But the acceptance criterion still says Last updated = 24 June 2026 (`specs/trust-pages.spec.md:35-38`), and `SOURCE-MAP.md:18` still says the owner decision is pending.
blockers.required_fix: Update the spec acceptance text and SOURCE-MAP to the resolved 2026-07-02 privacy version/status so the audit trail matches the code and vault.

non_blocking_notes: No new secret, public-token enumeration, or authorization bypass was found in the changed runtime code reviewed for this slice.
Added member-facing strings in the diff do not introduce em dashes; the legal copy is plain-language and vault-sourced aside from link/date substitutions.
I did not run build or E2E because this review is read-only; `git diff --check` reported no whitespace errors.

spec_compliance.criterion: /privacy page from vault Part 1, styled with EN nav/footer, no draft banner
spec_compliance.evidence: `src/pages/privacy.astro` renders the amended vault policy body and uses the resolved 2026-07-02 version, but the spec metadata still needs correction.

spec_compliance.criterion: Vault/PRD data-request path for privacy rights
spec_compliance.evidence: No public route, Convex `DataRequest` table, or `submitDataRequest` action exists; only a support email is shown.

spec_compliance.criterion: /safeguarding page from vault statement with /privacy cross-link
spec_compliance.evidence: `src/pages/safeguarding.astro` renders the public statement and links data handling to `/privacy`.
Both footers link internally to `/privacy`, `/safeguarding`, and `/terms`.

spec_compliance.criterion: UX-1 noscript and verify timeout state
spec_compliance.evidence: /join, /portal, and /verify include noscript messages; `VerifyApp` adds an 8-second fallback state.
`public/robots.txt` allows the site, disallows `/portal` and `/verify`, and points at the sitemap index.
`astro.config.mjs` adds `@astrojs/sitemap` with a filter excluding `/portal` and `/verify`.

spec_compliance.criterion: Canonical URLs + og:url from one site constant
spec_compliance.evidence: All pages pass `path`; `Base.astro` emits canonical and og:url from `SITE`, also used by `astro.config.mjs`.

spec_compliance.criterion: hreflang on six EN/AR page pairs plus x-default
spec_compliance.evidence: The six EN/AR page pairs pass reciprocal `path`/`alternate` props; `Base.astro` emits `en`, `ar`, and `x-default` links.
`src/pages/404.astro` renders the requested message, Home/Join/Contact links, and Arabic line.

spec_compliance.criterion: Organization JSON-LD on EN and AR home pages
spec_compliance.evidence: Both home pages include Organization JSON-LD with name, url, logo, parentOrganization, sameAs, and email.
`tests/e2e/trust-pages.spec.ts` covers privacy, safeguarding, terms, robots, sitemap, canonical/hreflang, 404, and noindex presence; execution was not run in this read-only review.

spec_compliance.criterion: No copy invention on new trust pages
spec_compliance.evidence: Privacy, safeguarding, and terms prose trace to the cited vault notes; the stale audit artifact falsely says otherwise.
The current review artifact and source-map/spec metadata contain stale contradictions described in the blockers.

summary: Do not ship. The rendered trust pages are mostly correct, but the vault-required DataRequest path is missing and the committed audit/spec metadata is stale enough to break the gate trail.
